MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-ScriptMetadata
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Extracts script and function metadata using native PowerShell AST parsing.
MissingHelpParameters.Description: Returns a rich object containing file-level Synopsis/Description and details about all top-level functions such as their names, synopses, defined parameters, and documented parameters. Replaces brittle regex routines.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Compare-ResponsePair
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Compares two responses using LLM-as-judge pairwise comparison
MissingHelpParameters.Description: Useful for A/B testing different models or prompts

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Compare-ResponseSimilarity
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Compares semantic similarity between response and expected output
MissingHelpParameters.Description: Uses word overlap and embedding-based similarity when available

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-DiagnosticQuality
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Evaluates diagnostic output quality specific to PC-AI use case
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Checks diagnostic responses for:
- Proper JSON structure
- Valid diagnosis categories
- Actionable recommendations
- Safety warnings where appropriate

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-EvaluationResults
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Gets results from the current or specified evaluation suite

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-RegressionReport
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Generates a detailed regression report comparing multiple baselines

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-EvaluationSuite
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Runs the evaluation suite against specified backend

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-Coherence
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Measures logical coherence of response

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-Groundedness
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Measures how well the response is grounded in provided context

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-InferenceLatency
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Measures inference latency over multiple runs

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-MemoryUsage
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Measures memory usage during inference

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Measure-Toxicity
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Basic toxicity detection (keyword-based)

MissingHelpParameters.Name: New-EvaluationTestCase
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Creates a new evaluation test case

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Initialize-NvmlInteropType
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis:
Emit an Add-Type C# class that P/Invokes the three NVML FFI exports from
pcai_core_lib.dll.  Idempotent — safe to call multiple times.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-FunctionGemmaDataset
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Build router training datasets for FunctionGemma.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Wraps Tools\prepare-functiongemma-router-data.ps1 to generate JSONL
training data and tool test vectors.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-FunctionGemmaEval
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Run FunctionGemma evaluation metrics.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-FunctionGemmaTests
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Run FunctionGemma dataset + evaluation tests.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-FunctionGemmaTokenCache
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Build a token cache for FunctionGemma training.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-FunctionGemmaTrain
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Run FunctionGemma LoRA fine-tuning.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-LLMChatTui
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Launches the PC_AI chat TUI for LLM interaction.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Send-OllamaRequest
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Sends a request to pcai-inference for text generation
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Core wrapper function for pcai-inference completions endpoint. Supports streaming responses,
custom models, temperature control, and timeout handling with automatic retries.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-PcaiMemoryPressure
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Analyzes system memory pressure for LLM agent optimization.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Uses native Rust FFI to analyze memory pressure including paging rates,
pool memory, handle leaks, and orphaned terminal processes. Falls back
to PowerShell-based analysis when native DLL is unavailable.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-PcaiOptimizationPlan
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Generates prioritized memory/performance optimization recommendations.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Analyzes current system state and generates actionable optimization
recommendations with estimated memory savings. Uses native Rust FFI
when available, falls back to PowerShell analysis.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-PcaiProcessCategories
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Classifies running processes into LLM-workload-relevant categories.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Groups processes into: LLM/AI agents, browsers, terminals, build tools,
and system services. Returns per-category totals for RAM optimization analysis.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-PcaiTopProcess
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Gets top resource-consuming processes.
MissingHelpParameters.Description: Returns a snapshot of processes sorted by CPU or Memory.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Get-PcaiServiceHealth
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Checks the health of PC_AI inference services.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Validates the status of pcai-inference Rust backend, FunctionGemma router,
WSL2, Docker, and optional legacy providers (Ollama, vLLM).

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-PcaiDoctor
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Runs a one-command doctor check for common runtime failures.
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Executes a focused health check for pcai-inference, FunctionGemma router,
native inference DLL availability, and GPU readiness. Returns the health
report plus recommended next steps.

MissingHelpParameters.Name: Invoke-PcaiServiceHost
MissingHelpParameters.Synopsis: Starts the PC_AI inference service (Rust or legacy C# backend).
MissingHelpParameters.Description:
Launches the pcai-inference Rust server or legacy C# service host.
The Rust backend is preferred and provides dual-backend support
(llamacpp and mistralrs) with GPU acceleration.
